description: Turns strategy into a content calendar with themes, cadence, and channel mix for 4 weeks. NOT for writing actual content pieces.

cases.query: I need a content calendar. I have my strategy done and I know my channels but I need a week-by-week plan of what to post and when.
What should I post? I finished my strategy last week and now I'm staring at a blank page. I need topics and themes organized into a schedule.
Content plan for the next month please. I can dedicate about 5 hours a week to marketing and I need to know exactly what to create.
How often should I post? I'm on X and LinkedIn and I have no idea what cadence makes sense for a dev tool startup.
Give me a weekly content plan. I want to know which days to post on which platforms and what the themes should be for each week.
Marketing calendar. I need to plan out four weeks of content with a mix of educational posts, product updates, and community engagement.
What to write for the next month. I have strategy.md and I need it turned into actionable content topics with deadlines.
Content cadence for a solo founder. I can't post every day. Help me figure out a realistic posting schedule that still moves the needle.
I need to organize my marketing output. Help me build a content-calendar.md that maps themes to weeks and gives me specific post types per channel.
Plan my content for April. I want to ramp up from 2 posts/week to 5 posts/week by end of month. What should the schedule look like?
I've been posting randomly with no structure. I need a real content plan that ties back to my strategy pillars.
Build me a content calendar that mixes long-form blog posts with short X threads. I want a sustainable weekly rhythm.
Write me a LinkedIn post about our product launch. I know the topic, I just need the actual post written.
Draft a thread about why developers hate marketing. Make it punchy and authentic.
Create a blog post about our approach to AI agents. I have a rough outline in my head.
Write marketing copy for our landing page. I need a hero section and three feature blocks.
Help me write a launch email for our waitlist. Something that creates urgency without being sleazy.
Review my strategy. I want to know if the messaging pillars are strong enough before I start planning content.
Check this post before I publish. I need a content review on voice and CTA.
How should I market this? I don't have a strategy yet. I need to start from scratch with positioning and ICP.
Publish this post to LinkedIn now. It's done and reviewed.
Set up auto-posting so my reviewed content goes out on schedule without me.
Run the whole marketing pipeline for me. I don't have anything set up yet.
